identityProviderId.title: Identity provider
identityProviderId.description: Upstream OIDC provider this notifier federates to.

resourceAudience.title: Resource audience
resourceAudience.description: Downstream resource/audience indicator for the resource server hosting the consent authorization_details schema. Sent as the 'audience' parameter on bc-authorize whenever configured (the provider's resource-indicator name — not RFC 8707 'resource'). clientId/secret/endpoints/scope come from the linked OIDC identity provider.

callbackClientId.title: Callback client id
callbackClientId.description: AM client used to authenticate the callback POST

callbackClientAuthMethod.title: Callback client auth method
callbackClientAuthMethod.description: How the notifier authenticates the completion callback to the gateway. Must match the callback application's token endpoint auth method.

consentRelayStrategy.title: Consent relay strategy
consentRelayStrategy.description: Optional id of an installed consent-relay transform. Leave blank to relay authorization_details unchanged (the default). A non-blank value selects a transform contributed by a strategy module on the plugin classpath (e.g. 'acme-user-profile').

hintDecorationStrategy.title: Hint decoration strategy
hintDecorationStrategy.description: Optional id of an installed hint-decoration transform. Leave blank to relay the CIBA hint verbatim (the default). A non-blank value selects a transform contributed by a strategy module on the plugin classpath (e.g. 'acme-hint-decorator').
